name: Palo Alto / Stanford, CA
jurisdiction: City of Palo Alto / Santa Clara County

documents.title: Plastic Bottles (#1 PET)
documents.instructions: Empty, rinse, and place in the blue recycling bin.

documents.title: Aluminum Cans
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in blue recycling bin.

documents.title: Cardboard & Paperboard
documents.instructions: Flatten and remove non-paper packing materials. Place in recycling bin.

documents.title: Glass Bottles & Jars
documents.instructions: Empty and rinse. Place in blue recycling bin.
documents.notes: No broken glass in bins — wrap and place in landfill cart.

documents.title: Food Scraps & Compostables
documents.instructions: Place in the green compost cart.
documents.notes: Palo Alto has curbside compost collection.

documents.title: Styrofoam / Expanded Polystyrene
documents.instructions: Not accepted in curbside recycling. Place in black landfill cart.

documents.title: Plastic Bags & Film
documents.instructions: Take clean bags to a store drop-off. Do not put in curbside bins.

documents.title: Batteries
documents.instructions: Take to Palo Alto Household Hazardous Waste or a retailer drop-off.
